title: An Act to Establish the Alzheimer's Disease and Related Dementias Prevention and Support Program
last_house_action: 6/10/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Committee on Health and Human Services suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES in concurrence

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY On OBJECTION of Representative MOONEN of Portland REMOVED . The Committee Report was READ . On motion of Representative MOONEN of Portland, TABLED pending ACCEPTANCE of the Committee Report. Later today assigned.

Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Committee Report was ACCEPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) was READ . On motion of Representative SHAGOURY of Hallowell, House Amendment "A" (H-512) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) was READ and ADOPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-512) thereto was ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-512) thereto. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports READ and ACCEPTED. READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) READ. House Amendment "A" (H-512) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) READ and ADOPTED. Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-512) thereto ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-442) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-512) thereto in concurrence.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT in concurrence
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table PASSED TO BE ENACTED in concurrence.
